Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of 76% of CryptoHydra Custody Services Private Limited by Narmada ESG Tech Limited (listed on BSE); non-binding except clauses on confidentiality, exclusivity, costs, and governing law.
Consideration: INR 184 crore cash at closing, subject to net working capital adjustment; 10% escrow for 18 months; INR 22 crore earn-out tied to ESG KPIs and cyber remediation milestones.
This document contains UPSI under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, relating to Narmada’s listed securities; trading window is closed from signing until 48 hours after stock exchange disclosure.
Cyber incident: Target experienced a non-public ransomware event on 15 May 2026; forensics indicate no loss of client digital assets; detailed reports accessible only in a clean room to wall-crossed recipients.
Crypto operations: Target provides INR-settled enterprise custody and staking for permissioned tokens; FIU-IND registration application acknowledgement dated 12 April 2026 is in the data room.
ESG/climate: Buyer will fund migration of data centres to a 100% renewable PPA and implement TCFD-style climate disclosures; an external assurer will verify Scope 2 reductions within 9 months post-closing.
DPDPA/PII: Parties will issue clear notices and obtain consent; no Aadhaar, PAN, or GSTIN shall be collected at term-sheet stage, and any subsequent KYC will follow purpose limitation and data minimisation.
Children’s data: Target confirms no processing of personal data of children (under 18); if any minor wallet signatory is identified, services will be paused pending verifiable parental consent and age-gating.
Information barriers and insider list: Buyer, banks, and counsel will maintain Chinese walls; insider list to include Ms. Kavya Iyer (Compliance Officer) and Mr. Devraj Menon (Promoter-Director); queries via compliance@narmadaesg.in.
No selective disclosure or tipping: all external communications to be routed through dealdesk@narmadaesg.in and disclosed to the stock exchange per Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR; no analyst, influencer, or vendor briefings until announcement.
Conditions precedent: satisfactory legal, financial, ESG, and cyber due diligence (including SOC 2 remediation plan, VAPT retest, and key ceremony review), verification of FIU-IND status, and no adverse notice from CERT-In.
Representations and covenants: Target to certify no undisclosed crypto wallets or side letters; immediate notification of any cyber incident; non-compete and non-solicit for 24 months; promoters subject to lock-in and blackout compliance.
Employee and ops: retention pool of INR 12 crore; background checks to exclude access to child data; grievance redressal contacts to be notified, including grievance.officer@cryptohydra.co.in.
Approvals: Narmada board, shareholder approval if required, stock exchange intimation, and any CCI exemption; no RBI license is required for the transaction as structured.
Educational/marketing carve-out: the “Crypto Custody and Cyber Hygiene” brochure for campus outreach is purely educational marketing and contains no UPSI, client data, or performance metrics.
Timeline and exclusivity: signing by 30 June 2026, long-stop 120 days, exclusivity for 75 days, break fee of INR 5 crore for seller breach; governing law India, courts at Mumbai.
